Comfortable Accommodation: Kasanty House in Paracas offers family rooms with private bathrooms, free toiletries, showers, TVs, and wardrobes. Each room includes a balcony for relaxation.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can enjoy a garden and terrace, perfect for outdoor activities. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Convenient Location: Chaco Beach is a 4-minute walk away, El Chaco Boardwalk 400 metres nearby, and Paracas Golf Course less than 1 km from the homestay. Nearby attractions include the Julio C. Tello Museum (6 km) and Paracas Reserve (23 km).
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for room cleanliness, convenient location, and beach access. Free on-site private parking is provided.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.

hotels.name: La Hacienda Bahia Paracas
hotels.description_fr:
La Hacienda Bahia Paracas is located right by Paracas Bay and has panoramic ocean views. The comfortably, rustic rooms have private terraces where guests can enjoy the sunsets.
All of the rooms at La Hacienda Bahia Paracas are air-conditioned and have full en suite bathrooms.
The El Coral Restaurant serves a variety of traditional Peruvian dishes and guests can choose to dine al fresco on the terrace.
The lagoon style outdoor swimming pool is furnished with parasols and sun chairs. Guests can also choose from a number of relaxing spa or massage treatments at the hotelâ€™s wellness centre.
Children over 3 years of age will be charged US $100.00 per night when using existing beds. Please note the hotel's facilities are exclusively for guest use.

hotels.description_en:
Offering a sun terrace and views of the mountain, Uros Samarana Uta Lodge is situated in Puno. Titicaca Lake is 7 km from the property.
Rates at this all-inclusive property include breakfast, lunch and dinner.
The accommodation is fitted with a seating and dining area. There is a private bathroom with free toiletries in each unit. Bed linen is offered.
Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant. The property also offers packed lunches.
Activities such as fishing, trips in totora boats, egg collection and photos with typical clothing are included in the rates.
Puno Port is 5 km from Uros Samarana Uta Lodge. The nearest airport is Inca Manco Capac Airport, 43 km from Uros Samarana Uta Lodge.
Transfer to the island can be arranged free of charge.

Elegant Accommodations: Amalia Titicaca Lodge in Puno offers comfortable rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and garden or lake views. Each room includes a dining area, work desk, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden, enjoy the outdoor seating area, and participate in culture classes. The lodge features a family-friendly restaurant serving local cuisine, a traditional and romantic ambience, and themed dinner nights.
Convenient Services: The lodge provides a shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, and full-day security. Additional amenities include room service, breakfast in the room, tour desk, and luggage storage.
